title: Our Love Story

chapters.title: Desk Mates
chapters.text: We started as colleagues, sharing ideas, coffee breaks and lunch in the office.

chapters.title: Study Buddies
chapters.text: We became schoolmates and allies, supporting each other as working students and proud family breadwinners.

chapters.title: Best Friends
chapters.text: That mutual support blossomed into a deep friendship. We found our favorite travel companion, dinner date, and confidant in one another.

chapters.title: Furparents
chapters.text: The love grew, and so did our family, with the addition of our beloved paws!

chapters.title: Now... Partners for Life
chapters.text: From desks to diplomas, through life's joys, challenges, and adventures, we've arrived here. We can't wait to continue our journey as husband and wife.

content:
We started as colleagues, sharing ideas, coffee breaks and lunch in the office.

We became schoolmates and allies, supporting each other as working students and proud family breadwinners.

That mutual support blossomed into a deep friendship. We found our favorite travel companion, dinner date, and confidant in one another.

The love grew, and so did our family, with the addition of our beloved paws!

From desks to diplomas, through life's joys, challenges, and adventures, we've arrived here. We can't wait to continue our journey as husband and wife.
